title: chionanthus zeylanicus var. dichotomus
intro: Chionanthus zeylanicus var. dichotomus, also known as Dichotomous Chionanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Oleaceae, commonly found in Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Dichotomous Chionanthus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
